title: Poke Clothing
description: Cosplay as your favorite Pokémon characters with craftable outfits!
body:
![PokeClothing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5440a6d1f68f72ce8efe7c957b6e46215384b852.png)

Become the Ultimate Trainer in Minecraft!

Poke Clothing is a cosmetic expansion mod designed to bring immersive, craftable trainer outfits to your world. Perfect for Cobblemon servers, or anyone who wants to look the part while filling their Pokedex.

Features:
- Outfits added: Ash (Every region); Misty; Brock; Team Rocket; Team Magma; Team Aqua; Dawn; Dawn (Platinum); Brendan; Brendan (Emerald); Jessie; James; Red
- Craftable Cosmetics: Craft custom shirts, pants, and hats using the Cloth item.
- Multiplayer Ready: Show off your drip to your friends.
- Vanilla+ Style: Designed to fit naturally alongside the vanilla Minecraft aesthetic and the Cobblemon art style.
- Survival Friendly: All items have balanced crafting recipes obtainable in survival mode.

Compatibility:
- [Cobblemon](https://cobblemon.com/en);
- [Roughly Enough Items (REI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei);
- Available for Fabric (1.21.1) and Forge (1.16.5).

[Buy me a coffee!](https://buymeacoffee.com/goncs)
[Join the Discord server](https://discord.com/invite/hRCa5Qd)

This is a remake of my [older mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pixelmon-clothes).

![Added Content](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/enyi2m8u/images/e867371f4a3b8e9eae320ac2863630aa819890c1.png)
